meta.note: Manual RupeeVest → AMFI scheme-code/ISIN crosswalk overrides. Reviewed mappings used by scripts/ingest/nav-source-discovery.ts. An override entry takes precedence over the name-matching engine and is treated as confidence='override'. Either amfiSchemeCode or isin must be set (both is fine); the other fields are documentation. When ISIN is null, the override is keyed by amfiSchemeCode alone — the script's invalid-override sanity check (both keys must agree) is skipped, and the canonical ISIN can be populated from the feed in a later pass.

overrides.fundName: Aditya Birla SL Dividend Yield Fund-Reg(G)
overrides.amfiSchemeName: Aditya Birla Sun Life Dividend Yield Fund - Growth - Regular Plan
overrides.reason: Ambiguous review (2 AMFI normalized-name candidates). RV is -Reg(G) = Regular+Growth; AMFI 101738 explicit 'Growth - Regular Plan'.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: SBI Arbitrage Opportunities Fund - Regular Plan - Gr
overrides.reason: Low-tier review match (Jaccard 0.75). AMFI uses the 'Gr' abbreviation for Growth, which the tokenizer can't equate to 'Growth'. Same SBI AMC, Regular plan. ISIN verified from review artifact.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: Franklin India Dividend Yield Fund - Direct - Growth
overrides.reason: Ambiguous review (4 AMFI normalized-name candidates: Direct/Regular × Growth/IDCW). RV (G) = Direct+Growth (RV convention); AMFI 118527 explicit 'Direct - Growth'.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: Kotak Infrastructure & Economic Reform Fund- Direct Plan- Growth Option
overrides.reason: Unmatched (Jaccard 0.6). RV abbreviates Infra→Infrastructure and Eco→Economic, which the tokenizer didn't equate. Same Kotak AMC, Direct+Growth per RV (G) convention.

overrides.fundName: DSP Natural Res & New Energy Fund-Reg(G)
overrides.amfiSchemeName: DSP Natural Resources And New Energy Fund - Regular - Growth
overrides.reason: Unmatched (Jaccard 0.667). RV abbreviates Res→Resources. Same DSP AMC, Energy/Power sectoral, Regular+Growth.

overrides.fundName: ICICI Pru Dividend Yield Equity Fund(G)
overrides.amfiSchemeName: ICICI Prudential Dividend Yield Equity Fund Direct Plan Growth Option
overrides.reason: Ambiguous review (4 AMFI normalized-name candidates: Direct/Regular × Growth/IDCW). RV (G) = Direct+Growth; AMFI 129312 explicit 'Direct Plan Growth Option'.

overrides.fundName: Baroda BNP Paribas Aggressive Hybrid Fund-Reg(G)
overrides.amfiSchemeName: Baroda BNP Paribas Aggressive Hybrid Fund- REGULAT PLAN -GROWTH OPTION
overrides.reason: Low-tier review (Jaccard 0.833). AMFI scheme name has a 'REGULAT' typo for 'Regular'. Same AMC, plan, growth option. ISIN verified from review artifact.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: Axis Children's Fund - No Lock in - Regular Plan - Growth
overrides.reason: Unmatched (Jaccard 0.571). RV 'Childrens' vs AMFI 'Children's' tokenize differently (apostrophe stripped to space). Identical scheme: Axis Children's Fund, No Lock in, Regular+Growth.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: Axis Children's Fund - Lock in - Regular Growth
overrides.reason: Unmatched (Jaccard 0.429). RV 'Childrens' apostrophe issue + 'Compulsory Lock in' vs 'Lock in'. Axis has exactly two variants: 'Lock in' (the compulsory-until-18 plan) and 'No Lock in' (schemecode 34004 above). RV 'Compulsory Lock in' maps to AMFI 'Lock in' by elimination.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: SBI Children's Fund - Investment Plan - Regular Plan - Growth
overrides.reason: Unmatched (Jaccard 0.4). RV 'Childrens' vs AMFI 'Children's' apostrophe issue. Identical scheme: SBI Children's Fund, Investment Plan, Regular+Growth.

overrides.amfiSchemeName: UTI Nifty Next 50 Exchange Traded Fund
overrides.reason: Low-tier review (Jaccard 0.714). 'ETF' vs 'Exchange Traded Fund' — token-set differs by abbreviation. Same UTI Nifty Next 50 underlying. ISIN verified from review artifact.
Unmatched (Jaccard 0.667). 'ETF' vs 'Exchange Traded Fund' abbreviation. Same Tata AMC, same Nifty 50 underlying.
